chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 1600 of 2019. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.05.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. None present. This petition primarily challenges the transfer and posting of the petitioner to Kashmore at Kandhkote. These questions concerns with the transfer and posting of the petitioner does not come within the frame of Article 199 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. The petition being misconceived is liable to be dismissed, however, since petitioner and his counsel is not present, we are inclined to dismiss it for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.
